title: Former CJI DY Chandrachud speaks at Vadodara Literature Fest 4.0 held at Parul University
description: Justice Dhananjay Y Chandrachud delivered a speech at the Vadodara Literature Fest (VLF) 4.0 Day 2 held at Parul University.Former Chief Justice of India Justice Dhananjay Y Chandrachud spoke in a line up comprising former Chief of the Army Staff of India General Manoj Mukund Naravane, and entrepreneur-author Ankur Warikoo. Justice DY Chandrachud's keynote speech discussed constitutional values, democratic thinking, and the Constitution as a living document that defends the principles of justice
